name: Betty's Creamy Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 8 medium potatoes; peel and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions: In a large saucepan of water, boil the potatoes until fork-tender. Drain and set aside. In a stockpot, melt the butter over low heat, add the onion, and gently sauté until soft and translucent (do not brown). Add the potatoes, cream, half-and-half, bouillon cubes, milk, salt, and pepper. Simmer over low heat until thickened and thoroughly heated, about 30 minutes. If you like a thicker soup, add a little cornstarch or flour, dissolved in a small amount of liquid.
